entities.name: Alarm 1017
entities.label: alarm
entities.description: Alarm No.: 1017 text: CABINET OVERHEATING type: Standard: Optional: effect: Alarm with immediate and controlled shutdown cause: The thermostat is not set correctly, the fan or the conditioner are not working, the electrical cabinet is too hot.

entities.name: Alarm 1018
entities.label: alarm
entities.description: Alarm No.: 1018 text: LOW PRESSURE type: Standard: Optional: effect: Alarm with immediate and controlled shutdown cause: The pressure of the pneumatic installation is not sufficient for the normal operation of the machine, or the line pressure switch is not adjusted correctly.

entities.name: Alarm 1013
entities.label: alarm
entities.description: Alarm No.: 1013 text: PSM FEEDER FAILURE type: Standard: Optional: effect: Alarm with immediate and controlled shutdown, deactivation of the hardware authorization of the axes/spindles feeder cause: Hardware problems concerning the axes and spindles.

entities.name: Alarm 1020
entities.label: alarm
entities.description: Alarm number: 1020 text: PROGRAMMING ERROR type: Standard: Optional: effect: Alarm with immediate arrest and control cause: An attempt was made to execute a program block containing a function M in one of the following situations which are not permitted: spindle removal when the bypass function is activated; spindle orientation when the rigid tapping function or pin synchronization is.

entities.name: PROGRAMMING ERROR
entities.label: Cause
entities.description: An alarm indicating a programming error due to executing a program block containing a function M in a disallowed situation.

entities.name: spindle removal when the bypass function is activated
entities.label: Situation
entities.description: Attempt to remove the spindle while the bypass function is activated.

entities.name: spindle orientation when the rigid tapping function or pin synchronization is enabled
entities.label: Situation
entities.description: Attempt to orient the spindle while the rigid tapping function or pin synchronization is enabled.

entities.name: spindle bypass mode when rigid tapping function or spindle synchronization is enabled
entities.label: Situation
entities.description: Attempt to use spindle bypass mode while the rigid tapping function or spindle synchronization is enabled.

entities.name: spindle rotation when the rigid tapping function is activated
entities.label: Situation
entities.description: Attempt to rotate the spindle while the rigid tapping function is activated.

entities.name: Spindle synchronization when tapping function rigid or pin orientation is enabled
entities.label: Situation
entities.description: Attempt to synchronize the spindle while the tapping function is rigid or pin orientation is enabled.

entities.name: rigid tapping when the spindle synchronization function is activated
entities.label: Situation
entities.description: Attempt to perform rigid tapping while the spindle synchronization function is activated.

entities.name: activation of bypass mode from a different channel of that of which the pin belongs
entities.label: Situation
entities.description: Attempt to activate bypass mode from a channel different from that to which the pin belongs.

entities.name: MANDATORY “S” CODE
entities.label: Cause
entities.description: An alarm indicating a mandatory “S” code error due to executing a program block containing spindle rotation functions without specifying the speed argument “S”.

entities.name: spindle rotation function M without S argument
entities.label: Situation
entities.description: Attempt to execute spindle rotation functions M (M3, M4, M73, M74, M203, M204, M273, M274) without specifying the speed argument “S”.

entities.description: MANDATORY “S” CODE

entities.label: Alarm
entities.description: PROGRAM NOT REWOUND

entities.name: cause1
entities.label: Cause
entities.description: An attempt was made to execute a program block containing the spindle rotation function M (M3, M4, M73, M74, M203, M204, M273, M274) without having designated the speed argument “S”.

entities.name: cause2
entities.label: Cause
entities.description: An attempt was made to execute a program block containing the pin orientation function M (M19, M219) without having designated the argument “B” concerning the positioning angle.

entities.name: cause3
entities.label: Cause
entities.description: At the start of the execution of the cycle we noticed that the number of the program selected in the channel is different.

entities.name: cause4
entities.label: Cause
entities.description: When we pressed the Reset button or we selected the automatic mode, rewinding was not carried out correctly.

entities.name: programmer
entities.label: Operator
entities.description: responsible for intervention: correct the program to insert argument “S”.

entities.description: responsible for intervention: deactivate control in the user page “GESTIÓN DES CHARIOTS”.

entities.name: operator
entities.label: Operator
entities.description: responsible for intervention: press the Reset key.

entities.name: Cause 1040
entities.label: Cause
entities.description: An attempt was made to start the automatic cycle with the main spindle clamp open.

entities.name: Cause 1041
entities.label: Cause
entities.description: When the opening command was given, the clamp did not open within the time limit of 5 seconds.

entities.name: Cause 1042
entities.label: Cause
entities.description: When the opening command was given, the clamp did not close within the time limit of 5 seconds.

entities.name: Cause 1043
entities.label: Cause
entities.description: There are no conditions for opening the clamp, for example spindle stopped or the spindle rotation function with clamp open has not been programmed (M33).

entities.name: Cause 1044
entities.label: Cause
entities.description: When the opening command was given, the microdetector signaled the closure of the clamp, or, when the closing command was ordered, the microdetector signaled the clamp opening.

entities.label: Operator
entities.description: Responsible for intervention.

entities.name: Cause 1043
entities.label: Cause
entities.description: There are no conditions for opening the clamp, for example spindle stopped or the spindle rotation function with clamp open has not been programmed (M33).

entities.name: Cause 1044
entities.label: Cause
entities.description: When the opening command is given, the microdetector has signaled the closing of the clamp, or, when the closing command is ordered, the microdetector has signaled the opening of the clamp.
